if.name: if
if.description: Return one of two values based on a condition.

switch.name: switch
switch.description: Return mapped result by matching a value against cases.

join.name: join
join.description: Join an array into a string with a separator.

split.name: split
split.description: Split a string into an array.

replace.name: replace
replace.description: Replace text occurrences in a string.

length.name: length
length.description: Return length of a string or array.

contains.name: contains
contains.description: Check whether value contains search term.

substring.name: substring
substring.description: Extract a part of a string.

parseDate.name: parseDate
parseDate.description: Parse string value into a date value.

formatDate.name: formatDate
formatDate.description: Format a date value into a string.
